Objective

I am passionate about leveraging my expertise in project management and strategic planning to drive meaningful results in a collaborative team environment. With a strong background in problem-solving and delivering projects on time and within budget, I thrive on challenges that allow me to innovate and improve processes. I am eager to contribute my skills in communication and leadership to support the team’s goals, while continuously learning and growing in a dynamic organization. My commitment to excellence and adaptability make me a valuable asset in any role I take on.

Mission

I am dedicated to delivering accurate, reliable, and efficient administrative and virtual support services. With strong attention to detail and a firm commitment to meeting deadlines, I ensure quality in every task I undertake. I continuously seek to learn and grow, readily adapting to new systems, tools, and evolving client needs. My goal is to provide consistent, dependable support that drives organizational success, fosters trust, and ensures lasting client satisfaction

Goal

My goal is to build strong competencies in data entry, administrative tasks, and virtual assistance tools while gaining valuable real-world experience. I aim to continuously improve my efficiency, accuracy, and time management skills, deepen my knowledge in e-commerce support, and grow into a reliable professional capable of taking on greater responsibilities. Ultimately, I aspire to contribute meaningfully and effectively to the long-term success and growth of every organization I serve.

Professional Work Experience

Data Encoder

Marc Louie Enriquez

Freelance

June 2025 - October 2025

In my role as a Data Encoder for Barangay (Small Town) attendance, I was responsible for the systematic management and digitization of community records, ensuring that all participant logs remained accurate and up-to-date. I expertly handled the high-volume entry of attendance data from various local events and programs, streamlining the firm's administrative workflows and driving overall organizational productivity. By implementing organized data management practices, I improved the speed of record retrieval and ensured that critical information was readily available for reporting and community analysis. I also conducted thorough verification tasks to maintain the integrity of our databases, which directly enhanced the reliability of our outreach and coordination efforts. My adaptability enabled me to manage diverse administrative duties and provide essential data support across different community projects, ensuring a seamless operational flow. These contributions were fundamental in maintaining a transparent and efficient record-keeping system, providing a strong foundation for ongoing community engagement and growth.

Data Automation Assistant

Edwin Cordente

Freelance

March 2024 - September 2024

In my role as a Junior Excel Automation Associate at Edwin Cordente, I managed diverse administrative tasks by incorporating basic macros and Excel automation to streamline repetitive data processes. I focused on transitioning manual records, such as community attendance logs and complex data entry tasks, into automated spreadsheets to ensure higher accuracy and faster updates. By utilizing foundational VBA and automated formulas, I improved workflow consistency and ensured that critical information was organized and ready for team review. My adaptability allowed me to handle high-volume data encoding while simultaneously finding ways to simplify routine tasks through technical tools. These contributions were essential in maintaining a transparent and efficient record-keeping system, providing a reliable, tech-supported foundation for the firm’s ongoing operational growth and long-term success. My work consistently ensured that data integrity remained a top priority for all projects.

College Graduate

Bachelor's Degree in Information Technology

STI College of Malolos

2022 - 2026

Bachelor of Science in Information Technology, STI College of Malolos Graduated with honors, achieving a GPA of 3.7. The First IT Congress: A Quantum Leap Towards Excellence

SYNTAX Org

April 2023

The First IT Congress by SYNTAX Org provided insights into cutting-edge IT trends and innovations. Participants honed skills in agile methodologies, cloud computing, and cybersecurity best practices. SAP University Alliances: HCM, WM, PS, EAM, CS, QM modules of SAP S/4HANA using Global Bike

SAP SE

December 2024

Completed the SAP University Alliances training focusing on Human Capital Management (HCM), Warehouse Management (WM), Project Systems (PS), Enterprise Asset Management (EAM), Customer Service (CS), and Quality Management (QM) modules of SAP S/4HANA through the Global Bike case study. Gained expertise in integrating these modules to optimize business processes and enhance operational efficiency. Developed practical skills in SAP data management, analytics, and module interconnectivity, enhancing my ability to drive business solutions and improve decision-making in professional environments utilizing ERP systems.
